title: GROUP_SEND: offline enqueue does not check recipient subscription
description: In broadcast_to_group (state.rs), offline members always get messages enqueued regardless of their subscription status. A subscribed group sender can enqueue messages for unsubscribed offline recipients. This is a design question: does subscription gate sending or receiving? If receiving, offline unsubscribed users should not accumulate messages in the queue. Current behavior allows message storage for unsubscribed users, which contradicts require_subscription if intended to gate all message flow.
